info.title: Find other list pages using filters (@explore subagent)

parts.text: Search for other route index pages similar to clients/index.tsx that might also use DataViewLayout, filter views, or useDataTableFilters. state.output:
<path>/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/routes/(protected)/(app)/clients/index.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import type { UseQueryOptions } from "@tanstack/react-query";
2: import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
3: import {
4:   createFileRoute,
5:   Link,
6:   useNavigate,
7:   useSearch,
8: } from "@tanstack/react-router";
9: import { Archive } from "lucide-react";
10: import { parseAsJson, useQueryState } from "nuqs";
11: import { useMemo } from "react";
12: import { z } from "zod";
13: 
14: import { DataTableFilter } from "@/components/data-table-filter";
15: import type { FiltersState } from "@/components/data-table-filter/core/types";
16: import { useDataTableFilters } from "@/components/data-table-filter/hooks/use-data-table-filters";
17: import { FilterViewTabs } from "@/components/filter-view-tabs";
18: import { DataViewLayout } from "@/components/layouts/data-view-layout";
19: import NavLayout from "@/components/layouts/nav-layout";
20: import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar";
21: import type { FilterViewDisplay } from "@/db-schemas";
22: import {
23:   type ClientItem,
24:   clientColumnDefs,
25:   clientColumnsConfig,
26: } from "@/routes/(protected)/(app)/clients/-view-config";
27: import { rpc } from "@/rpc/client";
28: 
29: export const Route = createFileRoute("/(protected)/(app)/clients/")({
30:   component: ClientsPage,
31:   validateSearch: z.object({
32:     view: z.string().optional(),
33:   }),
34: });
35: 
36: type FilterViewRow = {
37:   createdAt: Date | null;
38:   display: FilterViewDisplay;
39:   domain: string;
40:   id: string;
41:   isSystemCreated: boolean;
42:   label: string;
43:   refine: FiltersState;
44:   updatedAt: Date | null;
45: };
46: 
47: type ClientListInput = {
48:   archived?: boolean;
49:   assigneeId?: string[];
50:   cursor?: string;
51:   limit?: number;
52:   search?: string;
53:   sortBy?: "name" | "createdAt";
54:   sortOrder?: "asc" | "desc";
55: };
56: 
57: const filtersSchema = z.custom<FiltersState>((val): val is FiltersState =>
58:   Array.isArray(val),
59: );
60: 
61: function filterKey(f: FiltersState[number]) {
62:   return `${f.columnId}::${f.operator}`;
63: }
64: 
65: function filtersEqual(a: FiltersState[number], b: FiltersState[number]) {
66:   return (
67:     a.columnId === b.columnId &&
68:     a.operator === b.operator &&
69:     a.type === b.type &&
70:     a.values.length === b.values.length &&
71:     a.values.every((v, i) => v === b.values[i])
72:   );
73: }
74: 
75: function mergeFilters(base: FiltersState, overrides: FiltersState) {
76:   const overrideMap = new Map(overrides.map((o) => [filterKey(o), o]));
77:   const result: FiltersState = [];
78: 
79:   for (const b of base) {
80:     const key = filterKey(b);
81:     if (overrideMap.has(key)) {
82:       const override = overrideMap.get(key);
83:       if (override && !filtersEqual(b, override)) {
84:         result.push(override);
85:       }
86:       overrideMap.delete(key);
87:     } else {
88:       result.push(b);
89:     }
90:   }
91: 
92:   for (const o of overrideMap.values()) {
93:     result.push(o);
94:   }
95: 
96:   return result;
97: }
98: 
99: function computeOverrides(base: FiltersState, effective: FiltersState) {
100:   const overrides: FiltersState = [];
101:   const baseMap = new Map(base.map((b) => [filterKey(b), b]));
102: 
103:   for (const f of effective) {
104:     const key = filterKey(f);
105:     const baseFilter = baseMap.get(key);
106:     if (!baseFilter || !filtersEqual(baseFilter, f)) {
107:       overrides.push(f);
108:     }
109:   }
110: 
111:   return overrides;
112: }
113: 
114: function filtersToBaseInput(filters: FiltersState) {
115:   let archived: boolean | undefined;
116:   let assigneeId: string[] | undefined;
117: 
118:   for (const f of filters) {
119:     if (f.columnId === "archived" && f.type === "option") {
120:       archived = f.values[0] === "true";
121:     }
122:     if (f.columnId === "assigneeId" && f.type === "option") {
123:       assigneeId = [...f.values];
124:     }
125:   }
126: 
127:   return { archived, assigneeId } satisfies Omit<
128:     ClientListInput,
129:     "cursor" | "limit" | "search"
130:   >;
131: }
132: 
133: function ClientsPage() {
134:   const navigate = useNavigate();
135:   const { view } = useSearch({ from: Route.id });
136: 
137:   const [urlFilters, setUrlFilters] = useQueryState<FiltersState>(
138:     "filters",
139:     parseAsJson(filtersSchema.parse).withDefault([]),
140:   );
141: 
142:   const { data: filterViewsData } = useQuery({
143:     ...rpc.filterView.list.queryOptions({ input: { domain: "clients" } }),
144:     enabled: !!view,
145:   });
146: 
147:   const filterViews = (filterViewsData ?? []) as FilterViewRow[];
148:   const activeView = view ? filterViews.find((v) => v.id === view) : null;
149:   const baseFilters = activeView?.refine ?? [];
150: 
151:   const effectiveFilters = view
152:     ? mergeFilters(baseFilters, urlFilters)
153:     : urlFilters;
154: 
155:   const updateFilters: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<FiltersState>> = (
156:     next,
157:   ) => {
158:     const resolved = typeof next === "function" ? next(effectiveFilters) : next;
159: 
160:     if (view) {
161:       const overrides = computeOverrides(baseFilters, resolved);
162:       setUrlFilters(overrides.length > 0 ? overrides : null);
163:     } else {
164:       setUrlFilters(resolved);
165:     }
166:   };
167: 
168:   const baseInput = useMemo(
169:     () => filtersToBaseInput(effectiveFilters),
170:     [effectiveFilters],
171:   );
172: 
173:   const { data: usersData } = useQuery(
174:     rpc.users.list.queryOptions({ input: { limit: 100 } }),
175:   );
176: 
177:   const assigneeOptions = (usersData?.items ?? []).map((u) => ({
178:     icon: (
179:       <Avatar className="size-4">
180:         <AvatarImage src={u.image ?? undefined} />
181:         <AvatarFallback>{u.name?.[0] ?? "?"}</AvatarFallback>
182:       </Avatar>
183:     ),
184:     label: u.name ?? "Unknown",
185:     value: u.id,
186:   }));
187: 
188:   const archivedOptions = [
189:     { icon: <Archive className="size-4" />, label: "Archived", value: "true" },
190:     { label: "Active", value: "false" },
191:   ];
192: 
193:   const {
194:     columns,
195:     filters: filterState,
196:     actions,
197:     strategy,
198:   } = useDataTableFilters({
199:     columnsConfig: clientColumnsConfig,
200:     data: [] as ClientItem[],
201:     filters: effectiveFilters,
202:     onFiltersChange: updateFilters,
203:     options: {
204:       archived: archivedOptions,
205:       assigneeId: assigneeOptions,
206:     },
207:     strategy: "server",
208:   });
209: 
210:   return (
211:     <NavLayout
212:       baseUrl="/clients"
213:       label="Clients"
214:       leftItems={<FilterViewTabs domain="clients" />}
215:       rightItems={
216:         <Link className="flex" to="/clients/new">
217:           New Client
218:         </Link>
219:       }
220:     >
221:       <DataViewLayout<ClientItem, ClientListInput>
222:         baseInput={baseInput}
223:         columnDefs={clientColumnDefs}
224:         emptyMessage="No clients found"
225:         filterSlot={
226:           <DataTableFilter
227:             actions={actions}
228:             columns={columns}
229:             filters={filterState}
230:             locale="en"
231:             strategy={strategy}
232:           />
233:         }
234:         getRowId={(row) => String(row.id)}
235:         listProcedure={{
236:           queryOptions: (opts) =>
237:             rpc.client.list.queryOptions({
238:               input: opts.input as ClientListInput,
239:             }) as UseQueryOptions,
240:         }}
241:         onRowClick={(client) =>
242:           navigate({
243:             params: { clientId: String(client.id) },
244:             to: "/clients/$clientId",
245:           })
246:         }
247:         searchPlaceholder="Search clients..."
248:       />
249:     </NavLayout>
250:   );
251: }

(End of file - total 251 lines)
</content>

parts.text: Now I have a comprehensive understanding of all the entity list pages. Let me compile the findings.

Here is a comprehensive summary of all entity list pages under `src/routes/(protected)/(app)/` and how each uses (or does not use) `DataViewLayout`, filter views, and `useDataTableFilters`.

---

## File Paths and Summaries

### 1. `/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/routes/(protected)/(app)/clients/index.tsx`
**The only page using the full `DataViewLayout` + `useDataTableFilters` + filter views stack.**

- **DataViewLayout**: Yes — wraps the main content area inside `<NavLayout>`, providing a unified data table with search, pagination, column definitions, and a `filterSlot`.
- **useDataTableFilters**: Yes — initializes filter state from `clientColumnsConfig` with a `"server"` strategy. Supports `archived` and `assigneeId` filter options.
- **Filter views (filterView)**: Yes — fetches saved filter views from `rpc.filterView.list` for domain `"clients"`. Uses `FilterViewTabs` in the nav layout. Supports view-based filtering where a saved "base" view is merged with URL-sourced filter overrides (`mergeFilters` / `computeOverrides` logic).
- **URL filter state**: Uses `nuqs` `useQueryState` to persist filters in the URL query string (`?filters=...&view=...`).
- **Filter merging**: Complex merge logic — when a filter view is active, the view's `refine` filters act as a base, and URL filters act as overrides. Only overrides differing from the base are stored in the URL.
- **Server integration**: Converts effective filters into API input (`filtersToBaseInput`) and passes `baseInput` to `DataViewLayout`, which calls `rpc.client.list`.

---

### 2. `/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/routes/(protected)/(app)/tasks/index.tsx`
**Uses a custom multi-view (list/kanban/calendar) with ad-hoc inline filters. No `DataViewLayout` or `useDataTableFilters`.**

- **DataViewLayout**: No
- **useDataTableFilters**: No
- **Filter views**: No
- **Filtering approach**: The `tasks/index.tsx` page itself has no filtering — it delegates to child view components. The `TaskListView` component (at `/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/components/task-list-view.tsx`) implements its own simple ad-hoc filtering:
  - A text `search` input for task title search
  - A `statusFilter` dropdown (`Select`) with options: All / To Do / In Progress / Done
  - A `showArchived` checkbox
  - These are passed directly as parameters to `client.task.list()`
- **Layout**: Manual layout with `page-wrap` class, tabs for switching views, and a `TaskDetailPanel` slide-out.

---

### 3. `/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/routes/(protected)/(app)/contracts/index.tsx`
**Simple list page with text search only. No `DataViewLayout` or `useDataTableFilters`.**

- **DataViewLayout**: No
- **useDataTableFilters**: No
- **Filter views**: No
- **Filtering approach**: A single `search` text input (`Input` with search icon) that filters contracts by title, reference, or client name. The search is passed as a prop to `<ContractsTable>`, which handles client-side filtering.
- **Data fetching**: Uses `rpc.contract.list` via `useQuery`.
- **Layout**: Simple `space-y-6 p-6` layout with heading, search, and table.

---

### 4. `/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/routes/(protected)/(app)/reports/index.tsx`
**Simple list page with URL-synced text search. No `DataViewLayout` or `useDataTableFilters`.**

- **DataViewLayout**: No
- **useDataTableFilters**: No
- **Filter views**: No
- **Filtering approach**: A single `search` text input that syncs to URL via `validateSearch` (Zod schema with `search: z.string().optional()`). The search is passed to `<ReportsTable>`, which does client-side filtering against `MOCK_REPORTS`.
- **Data fetching**: Uses mock data (`MOCK_REPORTS`) — not a live API.
- **Layout**: Simple `space-y-6 p-6` layout with heading, search, and table.

---

### 5. `/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/routes/(protected)/(app)/drafts.tsx`
**Simple list page with no filtering at all. No `DataViewLayout` or `useDataTableFilters`.**

- **DataViewLayout**: No
- **useDataTableFilters**: No
- **Filter views**: No
- **Filtering approach**: None — no search or filter controls. Loads all drafts via `rpc.draft.list({ limit: 50, sortOrder: "desc" })`.
- **Layout**: Manual layout with a plain HTML `Table` and delete/resume actions.

---

### 6. `/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/routes/(protected)/(app)/prospects.tsx`
**Simple list page delegating to `ProspectListView`. No `DataViewLayout` or `useDataTableFilters`.**

- **DataViewLayout**: No
- **useDataTableFilters**: No
- **Filter views**: No
- **Filtering approach**: The `ProspectListView` component does not appear to have any filter-related code (grep found no matches for "filter" or "Filter").
- **Layout**: `page-wrap py-8` layout with a heading, "New Prospect" button, and `ProspectListView` / `ProspectDetailPanel`.

---

### 7. `/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/routes/(protected)/(app)/job-mandates/index.tsx`
**Placeholder page.**

- Empty component rendering an empty centered `<div>`. No data, no filters, no layout.

---

### 8. `/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/src/routes/(protected)/(app)/audit-log.tsx`
**Placeholder page.**

- Renders "PENDING" text. No data, no filters, no layout.

---

## Summary Table

| Page | File | DataViewLayout | useDataTableFilters | Filter Views | Filter Approach |
|------|------|---------------|---------------------|--------------|-----------------|
| **Clients** | `clients/index.tsx` | Yes | Yes | Yes (domain: "clients") | Full server-side filter system with view merging, URL persistence, `DataTableFilter` component |
| **Tasks** | `tasks/index.tsx` | No | No | No | Ad-hoc: text search + status dropdown + archived checkbox (in `TaskListView`) |
| **Contracts** | `contracts/index.tsx` | No | No | No | Text search only (client-side in `ContractsTable`) |
| **Reports** | `reports/index.tsx` | No | No | No | Text search synced to URL (client-side on mock data) |
| **Drafts** | `drafts.tsx` | No | No | No | No filtering at all |
| **Prospects** | `prospects.tsx` | No | No | No | No filtering (delegates to `ProspectListView`) |
| **Job Mandates** | `job-mandates/index.tsx` | No | No | No | Placeholder (empty) |
| **Audit Log** | `audit-log.tsx` | No | No | No | Placeholder (empty) |

**Key finding**: `clients/index.tsx` is currently the **only** route that uses the `DataViewLayout`, `useDataTableFilters`, `DataTableFilter`, `FilterViewTabs`, and the `filterView` RPC. All other entity list pages use simpler, ad-hoc filtering (or none at all).
